common.ctaText: Reserve now and let our team craft a table experience around your pace, preferences, and the season's best ingredients.

home.title: Light, fire, and precision on every plate
home.subtitle: Aurelien is a modern European restaurant where seasonal produce meets quiet theatricality. Every course is paced for conversation, depth, and memory.

highlights.title: Seasonal tasting
highlights.text: A six-course journey that evolves every six weeks.

highlights.title: Open flame kitchen
highlights.text: Live charcoal techniques with clean, elegant finishes.

highlights.title: Curated cellar
highlights.text: European wines selected for balance, not volume.

home.testimonialTitle: Guests return for the calm confidence

testimonials.quote: The service felt intuitive and never intrusive. Every course had a clear story.
testimonials.author: Elena Morris

testimonials.quote: A rare balance between creativity and comfort. The pacing of dinner was flawless.
testimonials.author: Daniel Park

testimonials.quote: One of the most coherent tasting menus in the city right now.
testimonials.author: Nina Alvarez

menu.title: Menu
menu.subtitle: Minimal on paper, layered on the palate. Built around peak ingredients and careful restraint.

categories.title: Small Plates
categories.description: Opening notes with bright acidity and gentle smoke.

items.name: Cured Sea Bass

items.name: Burnt Leek Tart
items.description: Comte, black pepper, and confit onion

categories.title: Mains
categories.description: Structured dishes with precise textures and deep reduction sauces.

categories.title: Desserts
categories.description: Low sugar, high expression; elegant endings.

items.name: Seasonal Sorbet Trio
items.description: Three fruit expressions of the week

about.title: About Aurelien
about.lead: We opened with a simple intention: make fine dining feel focused, warm, and grounded in the season.
about.body: Our dining room is built on contrast: soft light, dark textures, restrained details. The kitchen works closely with coastal growers, heritage farms, and artisan producers to keep every menu iteration honest and alive.
values: Ingredient-first sourcing from trusted regional partners
Service that reads the room and adapts naturally
A calm rhythm that lets each course land with purpose

chef.title: Chef Adrien Voss
chef.subtitle: Classically trained, seasonally obsessed
chef.bio: After leading kitchens in Lyon and Copenhagen, Adrien returned to build a dining concept centered on modern European flavor architecture. His approach is technical but never heavy, blending open-fire methods with bright, clean finishes.
chef.quote: Luxury is not excess. Luxury is clarity, timing, and trust in every ingredient.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: A glimpse of atmosphere, craft, and late-night glow.
items: Open flame pass during evening service
Dining room just before first seating
Chef's table with final garnish sequence
